headline: Transcript: Quizmas special — Political Fix’s 2025 nerd-out!
summary: George Parker talks to Miranda Green, Stephen Bush, Robert Shrimsley, Jim Pickard and Anna Gross
body_text:
This is an audio transcript of the Political Fix podcast episode: ‘Quizmas special — Political Fix’s 2025 nerd-out!’

Bianca WakemanDon’t fancy wearing a hat, Robert?

Robert ShrimsleyThat would be correct.

Stephen BushYou’ve been visited by three ghosts.

Robert ShrimsleyHats, tattoos and fancy dress. Humbug.

Miranda GreenHi, George.

George ParkerHello. How are you?

Miranda GreenI’m very well, thank you.

George ParkerShrimmers, where’s your hat?

Robert ShrimsleyIt’s here. I’ve definitely got it. (Laughter)

Jim PickardLook at these little sweeties and things.

Flo PhillipsThe prosecco’s about to be popped.

George ParkerYeah, exactly.

Jim PickardWhat about Shrimmers? Shrimmers is not wearing a festive hat.

Flo PhillipsHe’s been offered one.

Miranda GreenI’d like somebody to open that bloody wine. I want a glass of wine.

George ParkerOK, ready when you are. Behind the screen, everyone.

Flo PhillipsOK, let’s go.

George ParkerReady to go.

Jim PickardHo ho ho.

[CHRISTMAS BEL
